title: Planet Her
notes:
See [r=23362880] for the Memphis Record Pressing edition.

Housed in a full-color gatefold sleeve.
Includes double sided insert with credits.

Release uses the digital standard cover despite having the deluxe tracklist of the album.
FBI anti-piracy warning on the back cover.

℗ & © 2021 Kemosabe Records / RCA Records. Marketed and distributed by RCA Records, a division of Sony Music Entertainment, 25 Madison Avenue, New York, New York 10010.
